member.name: T:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.CodeCoverage
member.summary: Utility class for the CodeCoverage API.

example.para: The following example loads a scene, starts coverage recording, initializes a number of instances of a prefab, then pauses the recording to load another scene, unpauses the recording, initializes a number of instances of a different prefab and finally stops the recording. It also sets the verbosity level to Verbose, so all logs are printed to the editor log.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.CodeCoverage.VerbosityLevel
member.summary: Sets the verbosity level used in editor and console logs. The default level is .
member.value: The verbosity level used in editor and console logs.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.CodeCoverage.StartRecording
member.summary: Call this to start a new coverage recording session.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.CodeCoverage.PauseRecording
member.summary: Call this to pause the recording on the current coverage recording session.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.CodeCoverage.UnpauseRecording
member.summary: Call this to continue recording on the current coverage recording session, after having paused the recording.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.CodeCoverage.StopRecording
member.summary: Call this to end the current coverage recording session.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.Events
member.summary: Events invoked during a code coverage session. A code coverage session is the period between starting and finishing capturing code coverage data.

example.para: In the following example we create event handler methods which subscribe to the , , and events. We use the InitializeOnLoad attribute to make sure that they will resubscribe on Domain Reload, when we enter Play Mode for example.

member.name: E:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.Events.onCoverageSessionStarted
member.summary: This event is invoked when a code coverage session is started.

member.name: E:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.Events.onCoverageSessionFinished
member.summary: This event is invoked when a code coverage session is finished.

member.name: E:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.Events.onCoverageSessionPaused
member.summary: This event is invoked when a code coverage session is paused.

member.name: E:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.Events.onCoverageSessionUnpaused
member.summary: This event is invoked when a code coverage session is unpaused.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.SessionEventInfo
member.summary: The code coverage session information retuned by the coverage session .

member.name: P:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.SessionEventInfo.SessionMode
member.summary: The code coverage session mode.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.SessionEventInfo.SessionResultPaths
member.summary: The coverage results paths of the files or folders created during the code coverage session.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.LogVerbosityLevel
member.summary: The verbosity level used in editor and console logs.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.LogVerbosityLevel.Verbose
member.summary: All logs will be printed in Verbose.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.LogVerbosityLevel.Info
member.summary: Logs, Warnings and Errors will be printed in Info.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.LogVerbosityLevel.Warning
member.summary: Warnings and Errors will be printed in Warning.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.LogVerbosityLevel.Error
member.summary: Only Errors will be printed in Error.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.LogVerbosityLevel.Off
member.summary: No logs will be printed in Off.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.SessionMode
member.summary: The code coverage session mode.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.SessionMode.TestRunner
member.summary: Describes a code coverage session triggered by automated testing, using the Test Runner.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.TestTools.CodeCoverage.SessionMode.Recording
member.summary: Describes a code coverage session triggered by Coverage Recording.
